title: erlang BIFs batch 1 — type conversion completions
purpose: Fill remaining type conversion BIF gaps: list_to_atom, atom_to_list, list_to_integer, list_to_float, float_to_list, float_to_binary, binary_to_atom, and additional arity variants. These are called throughout OTP stdlib and Gleam libraries for string/atom/number interconversion.
task: Register ~15 remaining type conversion BIFs that are not yet implemented.

requirements.title: Atom-list conversions
requirements.spec: list_to_atom/1 (character list to atom), atom_to_list/1 (atom to character list), list_to_existing_atom/1 (only if atom exists).
acceptance: list_to_existing_atom of unknown atom returns badarg

requirements.title: Number-list conversions
requirements.spec: list_to_integer/1, list_to_float/1, float_to_list/1, float_to_binary/2 (with format options).

requirements.title: Binary-atom and remaining conversions
requirements.spec: binary_to_atom/1 (binary to atom, always UTF-8), atom_to_binary/1 (1-arg version if not already present), binary_to_existing_atom/2 (encoding param).
acceptance: binary_to_existing_atom with unknown atom returns badarg

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement term_to_binary or binary_to_term — those are ETF serialization (B-117 scope)
SHALL NOT implement unicode-aware atom encoding beyond UTF-8
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
